evals.prompt: Inspect my academic website repo and create a site-specific maintenance skill. I want future agents to know which sections they can polish, which sections require my exact wording, and how publications, CV versioning, and profile metadata work.
evals.expected_output: A repo assessment, a short list of unresolved high-value questions, a normalized rulebook, and a downstream maintenance skill draft that captures publication, CV, and profile rules.

evals.prompt: Turn this portfolio website repo into a maintenance skill. It has a homepage, projects, writing pages, and downloadable resume assets. I need the AI to learn style consistency and what not to touch.
evals.expected_output: A framework-aware repo map, section governance rules, style-preservation questions, and a downstream maintenance skill that is not overfit to academic-site assumptions.

evals.prompt: Create a repo-specific maintenance skill for this personal website. Some content is duplicated between the homepage and dedicated pages, and I want future agents to preserve consistency and know what should be centralized.
evals.expected_output: A rulebook that detects duplication and centralization opportunities, plus a downstream maintenance skill that teaches future agents how to avoid content drift.
